channel.title: About on Hello Friend
channel.description: Recent content in About on Hello Friend

item.title: SAP Intelligent RPA: Mass creation of users on SAP Systems (using tcode su01)
item.description: Background As new recruits to the SAP Integration and Certification Center, my colleague Abhishek Malik and I were keen on making our mark in the team. The opportunity presented itself to us when 2 of our colleagues had to create a large number of users on certain SAP systems. Having been introduced to SAP Intelligent RPA (through courses on openSAP), we were excited to start working on using iRPA to automate this task.

item.title: Education
item.description: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Qualification: MTech (Software Engineering) CGPA: NA Duration: 2019 - Present Location: Pilani, Rajasthan Sri Krishna Arts and Science College Qualification: BCA (Computer Applications) CGPA: 8 Duration: 2016 - 2019 Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu Stanes Anglo Indian Higher Secondary School Qualification: HSC (Higher Secondary Certificate) Percentage: 75% Duration: 2014 - 2016 Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu Stanes Anglo Indian Higher Secondary School Qualification: SSLC (Secondary School Leaving Certificate) Percentage: 90% Duration: 2007 - 2014 Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu
